input.background: An aircraft has four engines (i.e., two on each wing) but can land using just any three or more engines. Assume that the reliability of each engine for the duration of a mission is $R_e=0.997$ and that engine failures are independent.
input.question: Calculate the mission reliability of the aircraft.

output.answer: Given $R_e=0.997$. The mission reliability of the aircraft is given by $$R_{\text{system}}=\sum_{i=3}^4\binom{4}{i}(0.997)^i(0.003)^{4-i}=0.9999462$$
